title: Team-member handoff: Estuarine docs-curation lane complete
body:
Team member closeout:
- Boundary owned: Estuarine Drifting Mast / codex / GPT-5 / 019e5e owned only the substance-preserving docs-curation lane for the hard/critical memory-surface report.
- Outcome: curation lane complete; Misty source window preserved in archive, active napkin replaced with disposition/pointers, pending-graduations active shard created, owner correction logged and expanded in napkin.
- Evidence: claim 62a576a2-86e0-4487-ad6e-ec6f031cb862 closed; closeout event fa9bbcd0-9229-42b8-9fc6-0ed12a66abb5 posted; pnpm practice:fitness --strict-hard exited 0 with SOFT only; touched memory markdownlint passed; git diff --check passed before this final handoff.
- Claims / queue / git state: no active claim remains for Estuarine Drifting Mast; no staging or commit performed; broader repo remains dirty with active marshal/implementation work owned by Hushed/Wooded/peers.
- Surprise or changed understanding: owner correction is the durable lesson: the numbers are only a signal; the work is processing and curating understanding without knowledge loss.
- Blockers or risks: no blocker in this lane; do not treat this handoff as repo-wide green or commit-ready.
- Handoff needed: none from Estuarine beyond preserving these edited memory/collaboration files for the active marshal/owner to route.
